bugs.title: Org search returns false-positive results for orgs with special chars in name
bugs.detail: Searching 'ACME' or 'acme' returns '(parentheses) Lone Star Outfitters' and '50% Off Redwood Provisions' which do not contain the search term. Likely tokenization splits on special chars (, %, ()). Case-insensitive matching itself works correctly.

cases.title: Org Switcher Visible for Multi-Org User
cases.notes: Account menu shows org list + search input for multi-org user

cases.notes: No org-specific contract pricing configured between orgs in current env
